capitulos.primeira_frase: The first thing I noticed that morning was the silence.
The penthouse had a view of the lake and good silence.

capitulos.primeira_frase: The doorbell buzzed again, and the sound pushed me toward the door

capitulos.titulo: The Decision I Didn't Ask to Make
capitulos.primeira_frase: The cemetery that Monday morning was nearly empty.

capitulos.titulo: The Night That Ended Without Blood (Again)
capitulos.primeira_frase: The hotel's smaller ballroom was half the size of the main ballroom
